meaning: n.方济各·撒肋爵的信徒,(天主教)撒肋爵会(又称"慈幼会")教徒
examples: The Salesian Images collection is one of the fastest growing of the collections.
They are materials used in training lay people in Salesian principles, Preventive System and Assistance.
Railway police in Assam have set up a team to probe the mysterious disappearance of a Salesian priest from a train four days ago.
